item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-02-27)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40499 Trending skills: 18549 Hot skills: 2564 Top All Time: find-skills (337803) Top Trending: agent-tools (20556) Top Hot: nano-banana-2 (465)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): read-github
item.description:
New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Read and search GitHub repository documentation via gitmcp.io MCP service.
**WHEN TO USE:** - User provides a GitHub URL - User mentions a specific repo in owner/repo format - User asks "what does this repo do?", "read the docs for X repo", or similar - User wants to search code or docs within a repo

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): gemini-computer-use
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Build and run Gemini 2.5 Computer Use browser-control agents with Playwright. Use when a user wants to automate web browser tasks via the Gemini Computer Use model, needs an agent loop (screenshot → function_call → action → function_response), or asks to integrate safety confirmation for risky UI actions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): openai-docs-skill
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Query the OpenAI developer documentation via the OpenAI Docs MCP server using CLI (curl/jq). Use whenever a task involves the OpenAI API (Responses, Chat Completions, Realtime, etc.), OpenAI SDKs, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex, MCP integrations, endpoint schemas, parameters, limits, or migrations and you need up-to-date official guidance.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): swarm-planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: [EXPLICIT INVOCATION ONLY] Creates dependency-aware implementation plans optimized for parallel multi-agent execution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): agent browser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): parallel-task-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit /parallel-task-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): codex-subagent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Spawn Codex subagents via background shell to offload context-heavy work. Use for: deep research (3+ searches), codebase exploration (8+ files), multi-step workflows, exploratory tasks, long-running operations, documentation generation, or any other task where the intermediate steps will use large numbers of tokens.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): parallel-task
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Execute plan files by launching multiple parallel subagents to complete tasks simultaneously. Triggers on explicit "/parallel-task" commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): markdown-url
item.description:
New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Route any website you need to visit through markdown.new by prefixing the URL.
**WHEN TO USE:** - You would normally open a website link to read content (docs, blog posts, changelogs, GitHub issues, etc.) - You need a cleaner, Markdown-friendly view for copying notes or summarizing

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): planner
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): find-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 610 Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 32 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): goframe-v2
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 32 Source: gogf/skills Description: GoFrame开发框架专属技能集。为Go语言开发者提供完整的框架使用指南，涵盖命令行管理、配置管理、日志组件、错误处理、数据校验、类型转换、缓存管理、模板引擎、数据库ORM、I18n国际化等核心组件的最佳实践。包含项目工程化结构规范、开发模式指引、常见问题解决方案以及丰富的实战代码示例。适用于构建RESTful API、gRPC微服务、Web应用等各类Go项目，帮助开发者快速掌握GoFrame框架特性，提升开发效率和代码质量。

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): technical-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): task-estimation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): looker-studio-bigquery
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and configure Looker Studio dashboards with BigQuery data sources. Use when creating analytics dashboards, connecting BigQuery to visualization tools, or optimizing data pipeline performance. Handles BigQuery connections, custom SQL queries, scheduled queries, dashboard design, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): performance-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Optimize application performance for speed, efficiency, and scalability. Use when improving page load times, reducing bundle size, optimizing database queries, or fixing performance bottlenecks. Handles React optimization, lazy loading, caching, code splitting, and profiling.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): file-organization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): log-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze application logs to identify errors, performance issues, and security anomalies. Use when debugging issues, monitoring system health, or investigating incidents. Handles various log formats including Apache, Nginx, application logs, and JSON logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): frontend-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): testing-strategies
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design comprehensive testing strategies for software quality assurance. Use when planning test coverage, implementing test pyramids, or setting up testing infrastructure. Handles unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, TDD, and testing best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): vet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 30 Source: imbue-ai/vet Description: Run vet immediately after ANY logical unit of code changes. Do not batch your changes, do not wait to be asked to run vet, make sure you are proactive.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): code-review
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct thorough, constructive code reviews for quality and security. Use when reviewing pull requests, checking code quality, identifying bugs, or auditing security. Handles best practices, SOLID principles, security vulnerabilities, performance analysis, and testing coverage.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Systematically debug code issues using proven methodologies. Use when encountering errors, unexpected behavior, or performance problems. Handles error analysis, root cause identification, debugging strategies, and fix verification.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): data-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze datasets to extract insights, identify patterns, and generate reports. Use when exploring data, creating visualizations, or performing statistical analysis. Handles CSV, JSON, SQL queries, and Python pandas operations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): security-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): workflow-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 30 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate repetitive development tasks and workflows. Use when creating build scripts, automating deployments, or setting up development workflows. Handles npm scripts, Makefile, GitHub Actions workflows, and task automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): pattern-detection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): prompt-repetition
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: LLM 정확도 향상을 위한 프롬프트 반복 기법. 70개 벤치마크 중 67%(47/70)에서 유의미한 성능 향상 달성. 경량 모델(haiku, flash, mini)에서 자동 적용.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): api-documentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers. Use when documenting REST APIs, GraphQL schemas, or SDK methods. Handles OpenAPI/Swagger, interactive docs, examples, and API reference guides.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): agentic-workflow
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 실전 워크플로우와 생산성 기법. 명령어, 단축키, Git 통합, MCP 활용, 세션 관리 등 일상 개발 작업의 최적화 패턴 제공.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): llm-council
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Orchestrate a configurable, multi-member CLI planning council (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, OpenCode, or custom) to produce independent implementation plans, anonymize and randomize them, then judge and merge into one final plan. Use when you need a robust, bias-resistant planning workflow, structured JSON outputs, retries, and failure handling across multiple CLI agents.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): npm-git-install
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Install npm packages directly from GitHub repositories using git URLs. Use when installing packages from private repos, specific branches, or unreleased versions not yet on npm registry.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): authentication-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): sprint-retrospective
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): system-environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure development and production environments for consistent and reproducible setups. Use when setting up new projects, Docker environments, or development tooling. Handles Docker Compose, .env configuration, dev containers, and infrastructure as code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): firebase-ai-logic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK. Handles Firebase AI SDK setup, prompt engineering, and AI-powered features.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): standup-meeting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct effective daily standup meetings for agile teams. Use when facilitating standups, tracking blockers, or improving team synchronization. Handles standup format, time management, and blocker resolution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): marketing-skills-collection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate marketing deliverables across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth using 23 specialized sub-skills with clear objectives, constraints, and validation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): remotion-video-production
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce programmable videos with Remotion using scene planning, asset orchestration, and validation gates for automated, brand-consistent video content.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Fetches latest Vercel guidelines and checks files against all rules.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): vercel-deploy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly. Use when asked to "Deploy my app", "Deploy this to production", "Create a preview deployment", or "Push this live". No authentication required - returns preview URL and claimable deployment link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): super-swarm-spark
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Only to be triggered by explicit super-swarm-spark commands.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): agent-evaluation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 29 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement comprehensive evaluation systems for AI agents. Use when building evals for coding agents, conversational agents, research agents, or computer-use agents. Covers grader types, benchmarks, 8-step roadmap, and production integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): role-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create and install Codex custom agent roles in ~/.codex/config.toml, generate role config files, enforce supported keys, and guide users through required role inputs (model, reasoning effort, developer_instructions).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): plan-harder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 34 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Use when user specfically says 'plan harder'.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): context7
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 33 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 API. Use PROACTIVELY when: (1) Working with ANY external library (React, Next.js, Supabase, etc.) (2) User asks about library APIs, patterns, or best practices (3) Implementing features that rely on third-party packages (4) Debugging library-specific issues (5) Need current documentation beyond training data cutoff (6) AND MOST IMPORTANTLY, when you are installing dependencies, libraries, or frameworks you should ALWAYS check the docs to see what the latest versions are. Do not rely on outdated knowledge. Always prefer this over guessing library APIs or using outdated knowledge.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#45): product-hunt-launch
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 1483 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Product Hunt launch optimization with specific specs, timing, and gallery strategy. Covers taglines, gallery images, maker comments, and launch day tactics. Use for: product launches, startup launches, side project launches, Product Hunt optimization. Triggers: product hunt, ph launch, product hunt launch, launch strategy, product launch, startup launch, product hunt tips, product hunt gallery, ph optimization, launch day, product hunt maker
